name: Hermes Costello
alt_names: エルメェス・コステロ
description:
__Height:__ 175 cm
__Prisoner 
Number:__ FE40533
__Stand:__ Kiss

Hermes is a woman voluntarily imprisoned in Green Dolphin Street Prison in order to seek revenge for her sister Gloria Costello's killer, Sports Maxx, and soon allies herself with Jolyne Cujoh in the hostile environment that the jail is. Thanks to a certain pendant, Ermes acquires her own Stand, Kiss, which has the ability of duplication stickers.
